gates.evidence: raw logs were parsed by M5.0 and loaded through M5.2/M5.6 creation path.
gates.name: Full chain execution

gates.evidence: 5 personas, 1000 total turns, sleep cycles after simulated days.
gates.name: Longitudinal runtime

gates.evidence: trait-distance stability and memory/procedural growth checks after sleep cycles.
gates.name: Personality stability and memory coherence

gates.evidence: automated rule-baseline action divergence; LLM/human judging recorded as optional.
gates.name: Comparative evaluation

gates.evidence: manipulation/context-switch/long-input checks plus safety-layer blocked topic and precision anomaly checks.
gates.name: Adversarial stress and safety

gates.evidence: M5.5 scenario battery run against an integrated persona.
gates.name: Game scenario transfer

limitations: Default artifact generation uses deterministic synthetic raw logs so CI can run without private chat data.
Automated rule-baseline comparison is engineering evidence; LLM-judged and blind human panels remain optional for formal fidelity claims.
Rule-mode response generation is accepted as the ablation baseline; LLM mode may mask personality signal and is not gated here.

methodology.adversarial_stress: Manipulation, context switching, private-memory pressure, emotional leverage, and long input.
methodology.comparative_evaluation: Default automated comparison against neutral rule baseline; LLM and human panels are optional non-gating extensions.
methodology.longitudinal_trial: Each persona runs over simulated days; sleep is triggered at day boundaries.
methodology.pipeline: M5.0 raw log parsing and user export -> M5.2 implantation -> M5.6 local runtime.

title: End-to-End Integration Trial - Raw Chat to Playable Digital Life
